title: Soak Test - Headset connected, app in background, phone actively used
scenario: App remains stable and responsive after prolonged background use with music playback on Home Screen
steps: 1. Install and launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Pair a supported Poly Bluetooth headset with the app.
4. Put the app in the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
5. Play music continuously from a third-party app such as YouTube or Spotify.
6. Leave the device idle for several hours (soak test duration).
7. After the soak period, bring the Poly Studio Mobile app back to the foreground.
8. Verify that the app is still running, responsive, and all UI elements on the Home screen are functional.
expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app remains running without crashing, is responsive when brought to the foreground, and all Home screen UI elements function correctly. No memory leaks or app freezes are observed.
